case_title: YENI VIVIANA SANCHEZ VS. PENG VENTURES LLC DBA BLUE HOTEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, YENI VIVIANA AS TO DEFENDANT PENG VENTURES LLC DBA BLUE HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY SANCHEZ, YENI VIVIANA PENG VENTURES LLC DBA BLUE HOTEL
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, YENI VIVIANA AS TO DEFENDANT PENG VENTURES LLC DBA BLUE HOTEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-23-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PENG VENTURES LLC DBA BLUE HOTEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DANIEL PENG (OWNER) FILED BY DEFENDANT PENG VENTURES LLC DBA BLUE HOTEL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DIEP M TRAN (MANAGER) FILED BY DEFENDANT PENG VENTURES LLC DBA BLUE HOTEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-20-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF YENI VIVIANA SANCHEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PENG VENTURES LLC DBA BLUE HOTEL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANIEL PENG (OWNER) WITH WITNESS DIEP M TRAN (MANAGER). PLAINTIFF REQUESTS IN COURT TO PROVIDE A SPANISH INTERPRETER. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER WAS NOT AVAILABLE FOR THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF MS. SANCHEZ DESPITE INITIAL REQUEST FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER AND WILL PROCEED KNOWING THAT SHE CANNOT APPEAL THE JUDGE'S DECISION ON THE CLAIM. PARTIES CAME TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2,300 TO THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT WILL PAY PLAINTIFF WITHIN 24 HOURS VIA HER ZELLE ACCOUNT WHICH IS HER MOBILE NUMBER. PARTIES CONFIRMED THAT DEFENDANT HAS PLAINTIFF'S CORRECT MOBILE NUMBER FOR THE ZELLE PAYMENT. THE CASE IS SET FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO 3-20-23 AT 3:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE IF PAYMENT IS SETTLED. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
